name: python3-tdb
title: python3-tdb
description:
Python3 bindings for TDB
This is a simple database API. It is modelled after the structure
of GDBM. TDB features, unlike GDBM, multiple writers support with
appropriate locking and transactions.
.
This package contains the Python3 bindings.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-tdb because Python3 bindings for TDB.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-tdb as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-tdb with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-tdb --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
